---
title: "Project Summary"
author: "Tianqi Ouyang"
date: last-modified
---

## Overview

The **HARMONY Terlipressin Registry** is a multi-center retrospective study of terlipressin use for hepatorenal syndrome-acute kidney injury (HRS-AKI). Data were collected from 15 centers via REDCap and analyzed in R.

## Centers

| Abbreviation | Institution |
|:------------|:-----------|
| BID | Beth Israel Deaconess Medical Center |
| BSW | Baylor Scott & White |
| CCF | Cleveland Clinic Foundation |
| CPM | California Pacific Medical Center (Sutter) |
| CSF | California -- San Francisco |
| INU | Indiana University |
| Mayo | Mayo Clinic (Rochester) |
| MCM | Mayo Clinic (Minnesota, secondary site) |
| MGH | Massachusetts General Hospital |
| MMC | Montefiore Medical Center |
| NWM | Northwestern Medicine |
| OCH | Ochsner Health |
| PEN | University of Pennsylvania |
| UNM | University of New Mexico |
| Yale | Yale University |

## Data Pipeline

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    A[15 REDCap CSVs<br/>Partners HealthCare Dropbox] --> B[Read & assign center IDs]
    B --> C[Alphabetize columns<br/>Drop inconsistent vars]
    C --> D[reorder_and_bind<br/>Merge all centers]
    D --> E[qc_check<br/>Find Discont_Day & missing data]
    E --> F[Remove excluded subjects<br/>34 removed, 8 re-treatment]
    F --> G[Derive clinical scores<br/>Child-Pugh, CLIF-C, MELD]
    G --> H[Compute outcomes<br/>HRS reversal, survival, transplant]
    H --> I[final_master dataset]
    I --> J[Table 1 / Stratified tables]
    I --> K[Survival & competing risk models]
    I --> L[Multiple imputation<br/>revision 0311.Rmd]
```

## Repository Structure

| File | Description |
|:-----|:-----------|
| `code/Tables.Rmd` | Main analysis (~1600 lines): data ingestion, QC, derived variables, Table 1, survival analysis |
| `code/revision 0311.Rmd` | Revision analysis: replicates pipeline, adds center grouping, dose-change categories, multiple imputation (MICE m=10), Fine-Gray models with Rubin's rules pooling |
| `data/final_master_01282026.xlsx` | Cleaned final dataset |
| `Terlipressin Database _ REDCap Code Book.pdf` | REDCap data dictionary (132 pages, 1500+ fields) |

## Key Outcomes

| Variable | Definition | Type |
|:---------|:----------|:-----|
| `HRS_reversal_new` | Lowest SCr &le; 1.5 AND (SCr day0 - lowest SCr) &ge; 0.3 | Binary (primary) |
| `hrs_responders_cat_2` | Any AKI stage improvement | Binary |
| `hrs_responders` | 0 = Non-responder, 1 = Partial, 2 = Complete | Categorical |
| `time_to_death_90days_cmp` | Min(time to death, time to transplant), capped 90d | Time-to-event |
| `time_to_death_status_90days_cmp` | 0 = Censored, 1 = Death, 2 = Transplant | Competing risk |

## R Packages Used

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## Full package list

tidyverse, tableone, gtsummary, survival, survminer, readxl, writexl, xlsx, ggplot2, ggpubr, splines, lattice, mice, DescTools, finalfit, tidycmprsk, ggsurvfit, sqldf, table1, cobalt, riskRegression, prodlim, pammtools, adjustedCurves
:::

## Exclusion Criteria

- **Removed subjects (n=34):** 7 BID-PTD patients, 24 MAYO patients (IDs 5--28), 3 MMC patients (IDs 005--007)
- **Re-treatment subjects (n=8):** Separated into `subgroup_master` -- BID-005R1/R2, BID-013R1, MGH-001R1, MGH-014R1/R2, MGH-026R1, NWM-014R1
- Patients without a determined `Discont_Day` are also excluded (`filter(!is.na(Discont_Day))`)
